uplink.description: Status report, shock/movement detected, low battery, negative temperature
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected normalized data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.0 low battery, Temperature -1 C two's-complement 0xFF9C, ShockTamperAlarm Alarm). Exercises motion-detected true and negative temperature.

uplink.description: Status report, no shock, normal battery, +18C, both temperature threshold alarms set
uplink._note: TTN-example input (alarm byte set to 0 and threshold byte to 3); expected normalized data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 12.0, Temperature 18 C 0x0708, LowTemperatureAlarm 1, HighTemperatureAlarm 1, ShockTamperAlarm NoAlarm). Exercises motion-detected false.
TTN-example input; upstream decodes this as a software/hardware version + datecode report with no measurement.

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (config response on fPort 23) carries no measurement
uplink._note: TTN-example input; fPort 23 is the config-response channel, not a measurement.
